Translation.Description: Ah the legendary Lost Barrowhill Wine! Its vines are said to grow on the burial grounds of the Arcane War casualties, charged with the wild magic of a thousand sleeping Archmages. You could get a lot more than a hangover from ingesting this heady liquor. Plus there's always a gold coin to be found at the bottom of the jug.
Translation.Provides: Lost Barrowhill Wine Effect - Random effect on the Caster
